lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਖੰਨੀਐ ਵੰਞਾ ਜਿਨ ਘਟਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਵੂਠਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tin khaneeai vanyaa jin ghatt meraa har prabh vootthaa |3|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am every bit a sacrifice to those, within whose hearts my Lord God abides. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਲੋੜੀਦੇ ਰਾਮ ਸੇਵਕ ਸੇਈ ਕਾਂਢਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo lorreede raam sevak seee kaandtiaa |
lines.english: Those who long for the Lord, are said to be His servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਜਲੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਖਟਾਨਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: mil jal jaleh khattaanaa raam |
lines.english: As water mixes and blends with water,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾਣੇ ਸਤਿ ਸਾਂਈ ਸੰਤ ਨ ਬਾਹਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jaane sat saanee sant na baaharaa |1|
lines.english: Nanak knows this Truth, that the Lord is not different from His Saint. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੰਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhant |
lines.english: Chhant:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗਿ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਨਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sang jotee jot milaanaa raam |
lines.english: so does one's light mix and blend with the Lord's Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਮਾਇ ਪੂਰਨ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਰਤੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪਹਿ ਜਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: samaae pooran purakh karate aap aapeh jaaneeai |
lines.english: Merging with the perfect, all-powerful Creator, one comes to know his own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਸੁੰਨਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਏਕੁ ਏਕੁ ਵਖਾਣੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: teh sun sehaj samaadh laagee ek ek vakhaaneeai |
lines.english: Then, he enters the celestial state of absolute Samaadhi, and speaks of the One and Only Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਗੁਪਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੁ ਵਖਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap gupataa aap mukataa aap aap vakhaanaa |
lines.english: He Himself is unmanifest, and He Himself is liberated; He Himself speaks of Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਨਾਸੇ ਮਿਲਿ ਜਲੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਖਟਾਨਾ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak bhram bhai gun binaase mil jal jaleh khattaanaa |4|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, doubt, fear and the limitations of the three qualities are dispelled, as one merges into the Lord, like water blending with water. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: prabh karan kaaran samarathaa raam |
lines.english: God is the all-powerful Creator, the Cause of causes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਖੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਗਲ ਦੇ ਹਥਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: rakh jagat sagal de hathaa raam |
lines.english: He preserves the whole world, reaching out with His hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਮਰਥ ਸਰਣਾ ਜੋਗੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਿ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: samarath saranaa jog suaamee kripaa nidh sukhadaataa |
lines.english: He is the all-powerful, safe Sanctuary, Lord and Master, Treasure of mercy, Giver of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਿਨੀ ਏਕੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: hnau kurabaanee daas tere jinee ek pachhaataa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to Your slaves, who recognize only the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਬਿਨਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sunahu binatee prabh karan kaaran samarathaa |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, hear my prayer, O God, Almighty Creator, Cause of causes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਰਨੁ ਚਿਹਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਲਖਿਆ ਕਥਨ ਤੇ ਅਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: varan chihan na jaae lakhiaa kathan te akathaa |
lines.english: His color and shape cannot be seen; His description is indescribable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਭ੍ਰਮ ਹਰਤਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: prabh dookh darad bhram harataa raam |
lines.english: God is the Destroyer of pain, suffering and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ehi jeea tere too karataa raam |
lines.english: These beings are Yours; You are their Creator.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਦੂਖ ਦਰਦ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਦੀਨ ਦੈਆਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhram dookh darad nivaar khin meh rakh lehu deen daiaalaa |
lines.english: Eliminate my doubt, pain and suffering in an instant, and preserve me, O Lord, Merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਸੁਆਮਿ ਸਜਣੁ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਬਾਲ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa suaam sajan sabh jagat baal gopaalaa |
lines.english: You are mother, father and friend, O Lord and Master; the whole world is Your child, O Lord of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਸਰਣਿ ਆਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਨ ਮਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo saran aavai gun nidhaan paavai so bahurr janam na marataa |
lines.english: One who comes seeking Your Sanctuary, obtains the treasure of virtue, and does not have to enter the cycle of birth and death again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸਭਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak daas teraa sabh jeea tere too karataa |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I am Your slave. All beings are Yours; You are their Creator. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har dhiaaeeai raam |
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, twenty-four hours a day,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛਿਅੜਾ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: man ichhiarraa fal paaeeai raam |
lines.english: the fruits of the heart's desires are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛ ਪਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਜਮ ਕੇ ਤ੍ਰਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: man ichh paaeeai prabh dhiaaeeai mitteh jam ke traasaa |
lines.english: Your heart's desires are obtained, meditating on God, and the fear of death is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦੁ ਗਾਇਆ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਾਇਆ ਭਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gobid gaaeaa saadh sangaaeaa bhee pooran aasaa |
lines.english: I sing of the Lord of the Universe in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and my hopes are fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਸਗਲੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: taj maan mohu vikaar sagale prabhoo kai man bhaaeeai |
lines.english: Renouncing egotism, emotional attachment and all corruption, we become pleasing to the Mind of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak dinas rainee sadaa har har dhiaaeeai |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, day and night, meditate forever on the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦੁ ਗਾਜੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt har gobind gaaje raam |
lines.english: In each and every heart, the Lord, the Lord of the Universe, sings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਵਾਜਹਿ ਅਨਹਤ ਵਾਜੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dar vaajeh anahat vaaje raam |
lines.english: At the Lord's Door, the unstruck melody resounds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਵਿਦ ਗਾਜੇ ਸਦਾ ਬਿਰਾਜੇ ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਊਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: govid gaaje sadaa biraaje agam agochar aoochaa |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe sings, and abides forever; He is unfathomable, profoundly deep, lofty and exalted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਬੇਅੰਤ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਪਹੂਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: gun beant kichh kehan na jaaee koe na sakai pahoochaa |
lines.english: His virtues are infinite - none of them can be described. No one can reach Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੇ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਜੇ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaae aap pratipaale jeea jant sabh saaje |
lines.english: He Himself creates, and He Himself sustains; all beings and creatures are fashioned by Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਦਰਿ ਵਜਹਿ ਅਨਹਦ ਵਾਜੇ ॥੪॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sukh naam bhagatee dar vajeh anahad vaaje |4|3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, happiness comes from devotional worship of the Naam; at His Door, the unstruck melody resounds. ||4||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੫ ਅਲਾਹਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: raag vaddahans mahalaa 1 ghar 5 alaahaneea |
lines.english: Raag Wadahans, First Mehl, Fifth House, Alaahanees ~ Songs Of Mourning:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਲਤਿ ਪੁਨੀ ਪਾਈ ਭਰੀ ਜਾਨੀਅੜਾ ਘਤਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: muhalat punee paaee bharee jaaneearraa ghat chalaaeaa |
lines.english: When one's time is up, and the measure is full, this dear soul is caught, and driven off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਸਿਰੰਦਾ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗੁ ਧੰਧੈ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan sirandaa sachaa paatisaahu jin jag dhandhai laaeaa |
lines.english: Blessed is the Creator, the True King, who has linked the whole world to its tasks.
